content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header_auth_verify("x-user-id", "401")
H: drop_header("x-user-id") ∧ if ∧ auth_risk("x-user-id")
P: keep_status("401") ∧ when ∧ verify_fail("x-user-id")
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: header_auth_verify("x-user-id", "401").
Hypothesis: drop_header("x-user-id") and if and auth_risk("x-user-id").
Plan: keep_status("401") and when and verify_fail("x-user-id").
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header_auth_risk_mitigation
H: drop_hdr("tenantId")|keep_401|spoof_denied("403")
P: verify(header("tenantId"))|auth_risk|drop_hdr|keep_401
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: header_auth_risk_mitigation.
Hypothesis: drop the header path("tenantId") or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied("403").
Plan: verify(header("tenantId")) or auth_risk or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid

P: drop_header(x-role) ∧ validate_auth_token() ∧ return_401_unauthorized()
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: header_auth_bypass and malicious_role_escalation and admin_privilege_hijack.
Hypothesis: x-role:admin and authorization_header_injection and spoofed_credentials and bypass_authentication.
Plan: drop_header(x-role) and validate_auth_token() and return_401_unauthorized().
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

[AUDIT]

@sigil v0 hybrid

P: verify ∧ auth_token ∧ "returnTo" ∧ redirect_url ∧ drop_hdr ∧ sanitize

A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: "returnTo" and redirect and "302" and header and auth and bypass and vulnerability.
Hypothesis: drop the header path and strip_auth and keep 401 behavior and response and spoofed requests denied and status.
Plan: verify and auth_token and "returnTo" and redirect_url and drop the header path and sanitize.
Verify: auth_risk and "302" and bypass.
